title: taraxacum helianthum
intro: Taraxacum helianthum, also known as the dandelion hawk's beard or bitter dandelion, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion genus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its high content of taraxasterol and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum helianthum include its potential to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and even help lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum helianthum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
